samples.xml_description:
<module id="alu">
    <description>ALU for a 32-bit MIPS-ISA CPU.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="a" width_description="[31:0]">First operand.</input>
        <input id="b" width_description="[31:0]">Second operand.</input>
        <input id="aluc" width_description="[5:0]">Control signal for selecting the operation.</input>
        <output id="r" width_description="[31:0]">Result of the operation.</output>
        <output id="zero">Zero flag.</output>
        <output id="carry">Carry flag.</output>
        <output id="negative">Negative flag.</output>
        <output id="overflow">Overflow flag.</output>
        <output id="flag">General flag.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant id="ADD">6'b100000</constant>
        <constant id="ADDU">6'b100001</constant>
        <constant id="SUB">6'b100010</constant>
        <constant id="SUBU">6'b100011</constant>
        <constant id="AND">6'b100100</constant>
        <constant id="OR">6'b100101</constant>
        <constant id="XOR">6'b100110</constant>
        <constant id="NOR">6'b100111</constant>
        <constant id="SLT">6'b101010</constant>
        <constant id="SLTU">6'b101011</constant>
        <constant id="SLL">6'b000000</constant>
        <constant id="SRL">6'b000010</constant>
        <constant id="SRA">6'b000011</constant>
        <constant id="SLLV">6'b000100</constant>
        <constant id="SRLV">6'b000110</constant>
        <constant id="SRAV">6'b000111</constant>
        <constant id="LUI">6'b001111</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <assign id="signed_a" width_description="[31:0]">Signed version of input operand a.</assign>
        <assign id="signed_b" width_description="[31:0]">Signed version of input operand b.</assign>
        <assign id="res" width_description="[31:0]">Register to hold the result of the operation.</assign>
        <assign id="shift_amount" width_description="[4:0]">Shift amount for shift operations.</assign>
        <assign id="flag" width_description="[0:0]">Flag output.</assign>
        
        <always_comb>
            <case id="operation_selection">
                <when condition="aluc == ADD">
                    <assign res = signed_a + signed_b;
                    <assign flag = 1'b0;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == ADDU">
                    <assign res = a + b;
                    <assign flag = 1'b0;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SUB">
                    <assign res = signed_a - signed_b;
                    <assign flag = 1'b0;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SUBU">
                    <assign res = a - b;
                    <assign flag = 1'b0;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == AND">
                    <assign res = a & b;
                    <assign flag = 1'b0;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == OR">
                    <assign res = a | b;
                    <assign flag = 1'b0;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == XOR">
                    <assign res = a ^ b;
                    <assign flag = 1'b0;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == NOR">
                    <assign res = ~(a | b);
                    <assign flag = 1'b0;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SLT">
                    <assign res = (signed_a < signed_b) ? 1 : 0;
                    <assign flag = 1'b1;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SLTU">
                    <assign res = (a < b) ? 1 : 0;
                    <assign flag = 1'b1;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SLL">
                    <assign shift_amount = b[4:0];
                    <assign res = a << shift_amount;
                    <assign flag = 1'b0;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SRL">
                    <assign shift_amount = b[4:0];
                    <assign res = a >> shift_amount;
                    <assign flag = 1'b0;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SRA">
                    <assign shift_amount = b[4:0];
                    <assign res = signed_a >>> shift_amount;
                    <assign flag = 1'b0;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SLLV">
                    <assign shift_amount = a[4:0];
                    <assign res = b << shift_amount;
                    <assign flag = 1'b0;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SRLV">
                    <assign shift_amount = a[4:0];
                    <assign res = b >> shift_amount;
                    <assign flag = 1'b0;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == SRAV">
                    <assign shift_amount = a[4:0];
                    <assign res = signed_b >>> shift_amount;
                    <assign flag = 1'b0;
                </when>
                <when condition="aluc == LUI">
                    <assign res = {a[15:0], 16'h0};
                    <assign flag = 1'b0;
                </when>
                default:
                    <assign res = 32'hzzzzzzzz;
                    <assign flag = 1'bz;
            </case>
        </always_comb>
        <assign zero = (res == 32'h00000000) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;
        <assign carry = (aluc == ADD || aluc == SUB) ? (res[31] != signed_a[31] && res[31] != signed_b[31]) : 1'b0;
        <assign negative = res[31];
        <assign overflow = ((aluc == ADD || aluc == SUB) && (res[31] != signed_a[31] && res[31] != signed_b[31])) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>Described above.</implementation>
</module>
